title: Frozen train/eval/litmus partitions (contamination firewall)
note: Sources are DISJOINT across splits: no stimulus is used both to litmus/eval and to generate training data. v1 scope = the causation pair (CAUSE_OF_SOURCE + EFFECT_OF_SOURCE) on TEXT PRIMARY sources only. Secondary-source stimuli are F5 (out of v1 scope) and listed separately. TRAIN is intentionally empty until the A3 corpus expansion (14 -> ~150 primary) runs; the current 14 primaries are reserved for the litmus build-gate + a small held-out eval. Freeze this file before any generation (plan_v2 M0).

firewall.novelty_tracking: also track held-out (development, archetype) novelty, not just stem/answer cosine (validator minor note)

LITMUS.role: docs/02 build-gate (P1/P2 + teacher key_valid_rate). NEVER used as a training seed.

EVAL_HELDOUT.role: product base-vs-tuned eval (plan_v2 5B). Disjoint from LITMUS + TRAIN. Expand to >=25-30 primary via A3 before the real product eval.

TRAIN.role: generation seeds. EMPTY until A3 corpus expansion; do not draw training seeds from LITMUS/EVAL.

pending.A3_corpus_expansion: 14 -> ~150 primary sources (license-provenanced); then re-populate TRAIN and grow EVAL_HELDOUT to >=25-30. HARD gate before M3 bulk gen.
